have h₁ : (parts₁ (x :: xs)).length = 2 * (parts₁ xs).length := by
     cases xs with
     | nil =>
       simp [parts₁]
     | cons y ys =>
       simp_all [parts₁, List.length, List.cons, List.nil, List.map, List.concatMap]
       <;>
       (try norm_num) <;>
       (try ring_nf at *) <;>
       (try simp_all [List.length, List.cons, List.nil, List.map, List.concatMap]) <;>
       (try norm_num) <;>
       (try ring_nf at *) <;>
       (try omega) <;>
       (try
         {
           induction' ys with z zs ih'
           <;> simp_all [parts₁, List.length, List.cons, List.nil, List.map, List.concatMap]
           <;> norm_num <;> ring_nf at * <;> omega
         })
       <;>
       (try
         {
           simp_all [parts₁, List.length, List.cons, List.nil, List.map, List.concatMap]
           <;> norm_num <;> ring_nf at * <;> omega
         })
       <;>
       (try
         {
           simp_all [parts₁, List.length, List.cons, List.nil, List.map, List.concatMap]
           <;> norm_num <;> ring_nf at * <;> omega
         })
   
   have h₂ : (x :: xs).length - 1 = xs.length := by
     simp [List.length]
     <;>
     (try cases xs <;> simp_all [List.length, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_assoc])
     <;>
     (try ring_nf at * <;> omega)
   
   have h₃ : (parts₁ (x :: xs)).length = 2 ^ ((x :: xs).length - 1) := by
     have h₄ : (parts₁ (x :: xs)).length = 2 * (parts₁ xs).length := h₁
     have h₅ : (x :: xs).length - 1 = xs.length := h₂
     have h₆ : (parts₁ xs).length = 2 ^ (xs.length - 1) := ih
     have h₇ : 2 * (parts₁ xs).length = 2 * (2 ^ (xs.length - 1)) := by rw [h₆]
     have h₈ : 2 * (2 ^ (xs.length - 1)) = 2 ^ (xs.length - 1 + 1) := by
       have h₉ : 2 * (2 ^ (xs.length - 1)) = 2 ^ 1 * 2 ^ (xs.length - 1) := by norm_num
       rw [h₉]
       have h₁₀ : 2 ^ 1 * 2 ^ (xs.length - 1) = 2 ^ (1 + (xs.length - 1)) := by
         rw [← pow_add]
       rw [h₁₀]
       <;>
       (try simp [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm])
       <;>
       (try ring_nf at * <;> omega)
     have h₉ : (x :: xs).length - 1 + 1 = xs.length + 1 := by
       have h₁₀ : (x :: xs).length - 1 = xs.length := h₂
       have h₁₁ : (x :: xs).length - 1 + 1 = xs.length + 1 := by
         omega
       exact h₁₁
     have h₁₀ : 2 ^ ((x :: xs).length - 1) = 2 ^ (xs.length) := by
       have h₁₁ : (x :: xs).length - 1 = xs.length := h₂
       rw [h₁₁]
       <;>
       (try simp [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm])
       <;>
       (try ring_nf at * <;> omega)
     have h₁₁ : (parts₁ (x :: xs)).length = 2 ^ ((x :: xs).length - 1) := by
       calc
         (parts₁ (x :: xs)).length = 2 * (parts₁ xs).length := h₄
         _ = 2 * (2 ^ (xs.length - 1)) := by rw [h₆]
         _ = 2 ^ (xs.length - 1 + 1) := by
           have h₁₂ : 2 * (2 ^ (xs.length - 1)) = 2 ^ 1 * 2 ^ (xs.length - 1) := by norm_num
           rw [h₁₂]
           have h₁₃ : 2 ^ 1 * 2 ^ (xs.length - 1) = 2 ^ (1 + (xs.length - 1)) := by
             rw [← pow_add]
           rw [h₁₃]
           <;>
           (try simp [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm])
           <;>
           (try ring_nf at * <;> omega)
         _ = 2 ^ (xs.length) := by
           have h₁₄ : xs.length - 1 + 1 = xs.length := by
             cases xs with
             | nil => simp
             | cons x xs =>
               simp [List.length]
               <;>
               (try omega)
           rw [h₁₄]
         _ = 2 ^ ((x :: xs).length - 1) := by
           have h₁₅ : (x :: xs).length - 1 = xs.length := h₂
           rw [h₁₅]
           <;>
           (try simp [add_assoc, add_comm, add_left_comm])
           <;>
           (try ring_nf at * <;> omega)
     exact h₁₁
   
   exact h₃

h₁ : (parts₁ (x :: xs)).length = 2 * (parts₁ xs).length := by
   dsimp [parts₁]
   <;>
   (try simp_all [List.length, List.map, List.bind, List.cons, List.nil, pow_succ, mul_add, mul_one])
   <;>
   (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [List.length, List.map, List.bind, List.cons, List.nil, pow_succ, mul_add, mul_one])
   <;>
   (try
     {
      induction xs with
      | nil => simp [List.bind, List.map, List.cons, List.nil]
      | cons x xs ih =>
        simp_all [List.bind, List.map, List.cons, List.nil, pow_succ, mul_add, mul_one]
        <;>
        (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [List.length, List.map, List.bind, List.cons, List.nil, pow_succ, mul_add, mul_one])
        <;>
        (try omega)
     })
   <;>
   (try
     {
      simp_all [List.bind, List.map, List.cons, List.nil, pow_succ, mul_add, mul_one]
      <;>
      ring_nf at *
      <;>
      simp_all [List.length, List.map, List.bind, List.cons, List.nil, pow_succ, mul_add, mul_one]
      <;>
      omega
     })
  
  have h₂ : 2 ^ ((x :: xs).length - 1) = 2 * 2 ^ (xs.length - 1) := by
   have h₃ : (x :: xs).length = xs.length + 1 := by
     simp [List.length]
     <;> ring
   rw [h₃]
   have h₄ : xs.length + 1 - 1 = xs.length := by
     have h₅ : xs.length ≥ 0 := by
       apply Nat.zero_le
     omega
   rw [h₄]
   have h₅ : 2 ^ xs.length = 2 * 2 ^ (xs.length - 1) := by
     cases xs with
     | nil =>
       norm_num
     | cons x xs =>
       have h₆ : xs.length + 1 ≥ 1 := by
         omega
       have h₇ : 2 ^ (xs.length + 1) = 2 * 2 ^ (xs.length + 1 - 1) := by
         have h₈ : xs.length + 1 - 1 = xs.length := by
           omega
         rw [h₈]
         <;> ring_nf
         <;> simp [pow_succ]
         <;> ring
       simpa [pow_succ] using h₇
   rw [h₅]
  
  have h₃ : (parts₁ (x :: xs)).length = 2 ^ ((x :: xs).length - 1) := by
   rw [h₁]
   rw [h₂]
   <;>
   (try simp_all [pow_succ, mul_add, mul_one])
   <;>
   (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [pow_succ, mul_add, mul_one])
   <;>
   (try omega)
  
  exact h₃

simp_all [parts₁, List.bind, List.map, List.range_succ, List.length, pow_succ, mul_add, mul_one]

h₁ : (parts₁ (x :: xs)).length = 2 ^ ((x :: xs).length - 1) := by
    simp_all [parts₁, List.length, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, pow_add, mul_comm]
    <;>
    (try cases xs <;> simp_all [parts₁, List.length, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, pow_add, mul_comm])
    <;>
    (try ring_nf at * <;> omega)
    <;>
    (try norm_num at * <;> omega)
    <;>
    (try
      {
        induction xs with
        | nil => simp_all [parts₁, List.length, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, pow_add, mul_comm]
        | cons x xs ih' =>
          simp_all [parts₁, List.length, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, pow_add, mul_comm]
          <;>
          ring_nf at * <;>
          omega
      }
    )
    <;>
    (try
      {
        simp_all [parts₁, List.length, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, pow_add, mul_comm]
        <;>
        ring_nf at * <;>
        omega
      }
    )
  exact h₁

    | inr h₂ =>
